text: Perfect! Now let me also check the send_raw_request function in anthropic to compare the complexity scores more precisely:

tool_uses.name: Bash
tool_uses.input:
{"command": "cat > /tmp/analyze3.sh << 'EOF'
#!/bin/bash

# send_raw_request (anthropic.rs 461-502)
echo "=== AnthropicClient::send_raw_request (anthropic.rs 461-502) ==="
sed -n '461,502p' rust/crates/api/src/providers/anthropic.rs
branches=$(sed -n '461,502p' rust/crates/api/src/providers/anthropic.rs | grep -c '\(if\|match\|for\|while\|?\|loop\|=>\)')
echo "Line count: 41, Branch count: $branches"
echo ""

# StreamState::finish (openai_compat.rs 422-474)
echo "=== StreamState::finish (openai_compat.rs 422-474) ==="
sed -n '422,474p' rust/crates/api/src/providers/openai_compat.rs
branches=$(sed -n '422,474p' rust/crates/api/src/providers/openai_compat.rs | grep -c '\(if\|match\|for\|while\|?\|loop\|=>\)')
echo "Line count: 52, Branch count: $branches"
EOF
chmod +x /tmp/analyze3.sh
/tmp/analyze3.sh
"}
